ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISNEW(), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Engineering', AND( Kick_Off_Call__c=0, Group_Training_Sessions__c=0, Trial_Group_Training_Sessions__c=0, Dedicated_Training_Sessions__c=0, Trial_1_1_training_session__c=0, API_Google_Sheets_Training__c=0, Deck__c=0, Trial_Deck__c=0, Trial_Insight_Email__c=0, Insight_Email__c=0 , Product_Configuration__c=0, Trial_Product_Configuration__c=0, Training_Summary__c=0, Client_Meeting__c=0, Data_Success_Taskforce__c=0, Trial_Trial_Summary_Presentation__c=0, Excel_Analysis__c=0, Product_Demo__c=0, Discovery_Call__c=0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Actions fields are for the consultants use only
